name: Olive Garden Pasta Roma Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups canned tomatoes, drained and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Add beans to a food processor and pulse until well mashed. Scrape down the sides as necessary. Reserve.
2. Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add carrots, onions, celery, and garlic; sauté for 5 minutes.
3. Add remaining ingredients (except pasta) and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes.
5. Keep soup warm.
6. Stir in cooked pasta and serve immediately.
